message: Got the notes from yesterday. Heat management was close but the ratio's still soft. We're running the tests again today - need to nail this before anything ships.
The ratio thing - yeah, I was thinking about that overnight, how the moisture-to-fat balance shifts the whole narrative of what this is supposed to taste like.
If the crumb collapses mid-bite, nobody cares about the story you're telling.
Margaret's right - the structure has to hold first, then we layer in everything else.
Fair point - I was getting ahead of myself. Let's see what today's tests show on the crumb structure and work backwards from there.
Maybe we're overthinking the moisture angle - what if we just nail the cornmeal ratio first and see if that solves it?
